user.title: Shutter Engine
user.description: Select the global entities used by the resolver. All fields are optional and can be changed later. Add schedules, rulesets, controllers and windows afterwards from the integration page.

data_description.sun_entity: The sun integration entity. Supplies azimuth and elevation for sun tracking and time windows.
data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity used for condition hints.
data_description.workday_entity: Binary sensor that is on for working days. Lets rulesets switch to a weekend schedule on non-workdays.
data_description.wind_entity: Binary sensor that turns on during a storm. Drives participating covers to the safe position.
data_description.frost_entity: Binary sensor that turns on during frost. Blocks movement of vulnerable covers.
data_description.fire_entity: Binary sensor that turns on for fire/smoke. Opens covers marked as an escape route.
data_description.burglary_entity: Binary sensor that turns on for a security alarm.

init.title: Global entities
init.description: Edit the global entities used by the resolver. All fields are optional.

data_description.sun_entity: The sun integration entity. Supplies azimuth and elevation for sun tracking and time windows.
data_description.weather_entity: Weather entity used for condition hints.
data_description.workday_entity: Binary sensor that is on for working days. Lets rulesets switch to a weekend schedule on non-workdays.
data_description.wind_entity: Binary sensor that turns on during a storm. Drives participating covers to the safe position.
data_description.frost_entity: Binary sensor that turns on during frost. Blocks movement of vulnerable covers.
data_description.fire_entity: Binary sensor that turns on for fire/smoke. Opens covers marked as an escape route.
data_description.burglary_entity: Binary sensor that turns on for a security alarm.

user.title: Add schedule
user.description: A reusable time plan: the night and morning windows with their offset to the sun event and an optional random window. Rulesets reference a schedule (and optionally a separate weekend schedule).

data_description.name: Shown when picking this schedule in a ruleset.
data_description.night_start: Earliest time the night action may run (24h HH:MM).
data_description.night_end: Latest enforced night time ("at the latest").
data_description.night_offset: Shifts the trigger relative to sunset; negative is earlier.
data_description.night_random: When set, the trigger is delayed by a random 0..n minutes (stable per day).
data_description.morning_start: Earliest time the morning action may run (24h HH:MM).
data_description.morning_end: Latest enforced morning time ("at the latest").
data_description.morning_offset: Shifts the trigger relative to sunrise; negative is earlier.
data_description.morning_random: When set, the trigger is delayed by a random 0..n minutes (stable per day).

data_description.name: Shown when picking this schedule in a ruleset.
data_description.night_start: Earliest time the night action may run (24h HH:MM).
data_description.night_end: Latest enforced night time ("at the latest").
data_description.night_offset: Shifts the trigger relative to sunset; negative is earlier.
data_description.night_random: When set, the trigger is delayed by a random 0..n minutes (stable per day).
data_description.morning_start: Earliest time the morning action may run (24h HH:MM).
data_description.morning_end: Latest enforced morning time ("at the latest").
data_description.morning_offset: Shifts the trigger relative to sunrise; negative is earlier.
data_description.morning_random: When set, the trigger is delayed by a random 0..n minutes (stable per day).

error.invalid_time: Enter the window times as HH:MM in 24-hour format (e.g. 06:30).

user.title: Add ruleset
user.description: A reusable behaviour bundle: target positions per day mode, thresholds and the schedule references. Controllers reference one ruleset.

data_description.sun_protection_position: Target cover position in sun-protection mode (0 closed, 100 open).
data_description.brightness_close: Above this brightness the cover starts shading.
data_description.brightness_open: Below this brightness the cover opens again.
data_description.temp_hysteresis: Switching dead band around the eco/heat temperature thresholds.
data_description.safe_position: Position covers drive to during a storm.
data_description.ventilation_position: Position used when a window is tilted for ventilation.
data_description.min_movement_interval: Minimum seconds between two movements of the same cover.
data_description.schedule_id: The schedule providing the night/morning windows.
data_description.weekend_schedule_id: Optional schedule used on non-workdays instead of the main one.
data_description.weekend_coupling: Switch to the weekend schedule on non-workdays. Needs a workday sensor on the hub and a weekend schedule.

data_description.sun_protection_position: Target cover position in sun-protection mode (0 closed, 100 open).
data_description.brightness_close: Above this brightness the cover starts shading.
data_description.brightness_open: Below this brightness the cover opens again.
data_description.temp_hysteresis: Switching dead band around the eco/heat temperature thresholds.
data_description.safe_position: Position covers drive to during a storm.
data_description.ventilation_position: Position used when a window is tilted for ventilation.
data_description.min_movement_interval: Minimum seconds between two movements of the same cover.
data_description.schedule_id: The schedule providing the night/morning windows.
data_description.weekend_schedule_id: Optional schedule used on non-workdays instead of the main one.

user.title: Add controller
user.description: Bind a controller to a Home Assistant area and pick the ruleset that drives its windows. Use the controller's switches (e.g. Automation, Lock) to pause it at runtime — for example while a child sleeps.

data_description.area_id: The Home Assistant area this controller manages. Each area can host only one controller.
data_description.ruleset_id: The behaviour bundle (positions, thresholds, schedule) applied to this area's windows.
data_description.day_mode: Initial daytime mode. Adjustable later through the area's mode selector.
data_description.heating_entity: Climate entity read in eco mode.
data_description.target_temp: Desired room temperature in eco mode.
data_description.room_temp_entity: Sensor providing the current room temperature.
data_description.max_temp: Above this temperature heat-protection shading kicks in.

data_description.area_id: The Home Assistant area this controller manages. Each area can host only one controller.
data_description.ruleset_id: The behaviour bundle (positions, thresholds, schedule) applied to this area's windows.
data_description.day_mode: Initial daytime mode. Adjustable later through the area's mode selector.
data_description.heating_entity: Climate entity read in eco mode.
data_description.target_temp: Desired room temperature in eco mode.
data_description.room_temp_entity: Sensor providing the current room temperature.
data_description.max_temp: Above this temperature heat-protection shading kicks in.

error.duplicate_area: That area is already used by another controller. Pick a different area.

abort.no_rulesets: Create at least one ruleset before adding a controller.

user.title: Add window
user.description: A controllable surface: pick one or more cover entities and their controller, then add the sun funnel and the escape-route flag. Several covers (e.g. a window front) share this configuration but are each resolved individually.

data_description.name: A readable label for this surface, shown instead of the cover list.
data_description.entity_ids: One or more cover entities driven together as one surface.
data_description.controller_id: The controller (area) this surface belongs to.
data_description.shade_type: Hardware preset seeding protection and capabilities.
data_description.slat_tracking: Re-angle slats with the sun. Default follows the shade type.
data_description.azimuth_from: Start of the sun azimuth range that hits this window.
data_description.azimuth_to: End of the sun azimuth range that hits this window.
data_description.brightness_entity: Optional per-window lux sensor overriding the estimate.
data_description.contact_entity: Window contact sensor enabling ventilation lock-out.
data_description.is_escape_route: If on, a fire alarm fully opens this cover.
data_description.min_movement_interval: Per-window override for the minimum movement interval.

data_description.contact_entity: Window contact sensor enabling ventilation lock-out.

abort.no_controllers: Create at least one controller before adding a window.
